# Enterprise training compatibility matrix

Generated from `lancedb_robotics.enterprise_conformance.compatibility_matrix()`, which classifies each case with the production `_training_backend_report` backend resolver. `supported` = the requested backend runs remotely; `fallback` = it degrades with an explicit report entry; `unsupported` = it fails fast with a typed error. There is no silent local materialization column because that outcome is a conformance failure, never a documented cell.

## Backend scenarios

| Case | Connection | Requested | Fallback policy | Result | Resolved / error | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `local-native` | `local_path` | `auto` | `fail` | supported | local | Local Lance-native lake; backend=auto resolves to local. |
| `db-remote-host-override` | `lancedb_remote_db` | `enterprise` | `fail` | supported | enterprise | db:// remote DB with an explicit host_override HTTP endpoint. |
| `db-remote-regional-default` | `lancedb_remote_db` | `enterprise` | `fail` | supported | enterprise | db:// remote DB with no host_override (regional default endpoint). |
| `rest-namespace-query-node` | `rest_namespace_lancedb` | `enterprise` | `fail` | supported | enterprise | REST Namespace-backed query node with direct object IO. |
| `namespace-direct-io` | `namespace_lancedb` | `enterprise` | `fail` | supported | enterprise | Namespace lake with authorized direct object IO. |
| `capability-disabled-deployment` | `lancedb_remote_db` | `enterprise` | `fail` | unsupported | UnsupportedRemoteOperationError | Enterprise connection whose deployment lacks server-side query. |

## Injected faults

| Fault | Connection | Fallback policy | Result | Typed error / fallback | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `auth-missing` | `lancedb_remote_db` | `fail` | unsupported | MissingEnterpriseAuthError | db:// remote with no API token or auth ref. |
| `auth-expired-no-refresh` | `rest_namespace_lancedb` | `fail` | unsupported | NamespaceCredentialExpiredError | Namespace credentials expired with no refresh hook. |
| `auth-expired-refresh-fails` | `rest_namespace_lancedb` | `fail` | unsupported | NamespaceCredentialExpiredError | Expired credentials; one refresh attempt still leaves them expired. |
| `auth-expired-refresh-recovers` | `rest_namespace_lancedb` | `fail` | supported | enterprise | Expired credentials; a single refresh clears the expiry and training proceeds. |
| `remote-scan-unsupported` | `lancedb_remote_db` | `fail` | unsupported | UnsupportedRemoteOperationError | Remote scan capability disabled with fallback='fail'. |
| `remote-take-unsupported` | `lancedb_remote_db` | `fail` | unsupported | UnsupportedRemoteOperationError | Remote take/blob-hydration disabled while materializing payload bytes. |
| `payload-hydration-unavailable` | `lancedb_remote_db` | `fail` | unsupported | UnsupportedRemoteOperationError | Blob/video remote hydration disabled while reading payload bytes. |
| `prewarm-unavailable-warn` | `lancedb_remote_db` | `warn` | fallback | fallback -> lazy-cache | Page-cache prewarm/status disabled; fallback='warn' degrades to lazy cache. |
| `cache-metrics-unavailable-warn` | `lancedb_remote_db` | `warn` | fallback | fallback -> remote-execution-without-live-cache-metrics | Cache metrics disabled; fallback='warn' keeps remote execution, marks counters absent. |
| `direct-data-plane-fallback` | `lancedb_remote_db` | `direct` | fallback | fallback -> direct-data-plane | Remote take missing but direct object IO authorized; fallback='direct'. |
| `explicit-local-fallback` | `local_path` | `local` | fallback | fallback -> local | Enterprise requested against a local lake; fallback='local'. |
| `stale-table-version` | `lancedb_remote_db` | `fail` | unsupported | StaleTableVersionError | Pinned snapshot table version cannot be checked out remotely. (surfaces at loader build) |
| `worker-resume-mismatch` | `lancedb_remote_db` | `fail` | unsupported | WorkerResumeMismatchError | Worker resume offset is beyond the planned epoch. (surfaces at loader build) |
